en_title: Stranger Than Heaven Director Addresses Concerns Over Tupac's Inclusion
subtitle: 家属已批准，真人配音
opus_summary: 《Stranger Than Heaven》导演横山昌义回应Tupac参演争议，称已获遗产管理方与家属同意，角色由真人配音而非AI。横山表示理解批评，但相信能增加游戏价值。游戏2027年登陆PC、PS5与Xbox。

paragraphs.en: The executive director of Stranger Than Heaven has addressed concerns around the casting of Tupac Shakur.
paragraphs.cn: 《Stranger Than Heaven》的执行董事回应了有关Tupac Shakur参演的担忧。

paragraphs.en: One of the most bizarre reveals from Summer Game Fest last week was that Tupac would have a supporting role in Stranger Than Heaven , despite the fact he has been dead for 30 years. To be clear: Tupac isn't playing himself in the game. Instead, the character that uses Tupac's likeness will be voiced by an actor without the assistance of AI. So really, the character is just a guy who looks like Tupac, making the situation all the more baffling.
paragraphs.cn: 上周夏日游戏节最离奇的公布之一，就是已故30年的Tupac将在《Stranger Than Heaven》中出演配角。需要澄清的是：Tupac并非在游戏中扮演自己。实际上，使用Tupac肖像的角色将由一位真人演员配音，不使用AI辅助。所以本质上，这个角色就只是一个长得像Tupac的人，这让整件事更加令人费解。

paragraphs.en: The decision to feature a dead music star so prominently in the game has raised a lot of eyebrows, especially after it came to light that Tupac's estate is managed by music executive Tom Whalley — a situation that has been the subject of legal disputes between Whalley and Tupac's family. However, IGN spoke with executive director and RGG studio head Masayoshi Yokoyama who addressed these concerns, and claimed that both Tupac's estate and family approved of his role in the game. Yokoyama also noted that Tupac isn't the first instance of the team using the likeness of a deceased actor.
paragraphs.cn: 在游戏中如此突出地使用一位已故音乐巨星的决定已经引起了很多人的关注，尤其是在得知Tupac的遗产由音乐高管Tom Whalley管理之后——Whalley与Tupac家人之间一直存在法律纠纷。不过，IGN与执行董事兼RGG工作室负责人横山昌义进行了交谈，他回应了这些担忧，并声称Tupac的遗产管理方和家族都批准了他在游戏中的角色。横山还指出，Tupac并非团队首次使用已故演员的肖像。

paragraphs.en: "We already have had a character like Tupac, who had passed away before the game was made [the character Genzo Iwaki with the likeness of actor Bunta Sugawara]. He's a really famous actor in yakuza movies and Japanese film history. But it's kind of the same situation, he's this famous actor who passed away. But we made sure that we talked to his estate and family and got their permission; not just their permission, but we talked to them about what we wanted to do. They not only said okay, but they were really excited about the opportunity. We wanted to give their characters a role that would do other justice to the people themselves as well. If we didn't, we think that would be extremely rude, so we definitely wouldn't have done it otherwise. So we did our best to make sure that any role we create for these characters would honor them and their families."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们之前已经有过类似Tupac的角色，即在游戏制作前就已去世的人物（角色岩城元三使用了演员菅原文太的肖像）。他是日本黑道电影和电影史上非常著名的演员。情况很相似，他是一位已故的著名演员。但我们确保与他的遗产管理方和家人沟通并获得许可；不仅仅是许可，我们还与他们讨论了我们想做的事情。他们不仅同意了，而且对这次机会非常兴奋。我们希望赋予他们的角色一个能公正对待他们本人的角色。如果我们做不到，我们认为那将极其无礼，所以我们绝对不会那样做。因此我们尽最大努力确保为这些角色创造的角色能够荣耀他们和他们的家人。」

paragraphs.en: Yokoyama also addressed how they went about casting someone to actually voice this character.
paragraphs.cn: 横山还谈到了他们如何为这个角色寻找实际配音演员。

paragraphs.en: "The next barrier we faced when we were bringing them back for these characters for these roles was their voice, right? We probably couldn't replicate their voices with AI if we went for it, but we're a studio that has really valued acting, not just movie acting but also drama acting. And we're really careful about the voice actors we chose in the past as well. So, we wanted to focus on getting a real person to put their own spin on that character. We didn't want to have them just do an imitation of that character, we wanted them to try to bring out that character's personality, but with a different voice. So, we did our best to pick an actor that would fit the role and fit that character, and some of these people might be related to them or have some sort of relationship to them."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们在让这些角色回归时面临的下一个障碍就是他们的声音，对吧？我们或许可以用AI复制他们的声音，但我们是一家非常重视表演的工作室，不仅是电影表演，还有戏剧表演。过去我们在选择声优方面也非常谨慎。因此，我们专注于找一位真人演员来对这个角色进行自己的演绎。我们不希望他们只是模仿那个角色，我们希望他们尝试带出角色的个性，但使用不同的声音。所以，我们尽力挑选适合这个角色和人物的演员，有些人可能与角色有关联或某种关系。」

paragraphs.en: The director also understood that people will be critical of the decision to feature Tupac's likeness, but welcomed that and believed in the creative choice the team made.
paragraphs.cn: 导演也明白人们会对使用Tupac肖像的决定提出批评，但他对此表示欢迎，并相信团队做出的创意选择。

paragraphs.en: "I think when you're creating any product in the entertainment industry, there's going to be criticism," he said. "You can't really say, 'don't criticize us' that just doesn't make sense. Criticism is a freedom that people are free to have. But, this is something that we thought was a good idea. That this would be something that would add value to our game, which is why we chose to do this. I mean, we had a similar issue with this when we announced the casting of Sugawara as well. He's obviously a very famous actor in Japan, and there were a lot of people who responded saying like, 'maybe you should have left him alone.' For Tupac, he's a person who's well known outside of Japan, and we expected those voices. But in the end, we are creating something we think people will enjoy and like. We think it's something that will add value to the game we're making. So, we have no real regrets or worries about what we're doing.
paragraphs.cn: 「我认为，当你在娱乐行业创作任何产品时，都会有批评，」他说，「你不能真的说『不要批评我们』，这根本说不通。批评是人们拥有的自由。但，这是我们认为是好主意的事情。这会给我们的游戏增加价值，这就是我们选择这样做的原因。我的意思是，当初我们宣布使用菅原文太的肖像时，也遇到过类似的问题。他显然是日本非常著名的演员，有很多人回应说『或许你们不该打扰他』。对于Tupac，他是个在日本以外广为人知的人，我们预料到了这些声音。但最终，我们在创造我们认为人们会喜欢和享受的东西。我们认为这会为我们制作的游戏增加价值。所以，我们对正在做的事情没有真正的遗憾或担忧。

paragraphs.en: "For me personally, I think trying to make everybody happy is the job of a politician. For a person who makes games, I think our job is to try to give an inspirational, emotional, or deep experience to as many people as possible. And if you try to make decisions just to avoid criticism, you will end up with something that can't do that."
paragraphs.cn: 「对我个人而言，我认为试图让所有人都满意是政客的工作。对于制作游戏的人来说，我认为我们的工作是尽可能给更多的人带来启发、感动或深刻的体验。如果你为了避免批评而做决定，你最终会得到无法实现这一目标的东西。」

paragraphs.en: It's unclear how big Tupac's role will be, but his character will have overlap with Snoop Dogg's character, Orpheus, a smuggler aiming to make a name for himself in Japan.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚Tupac角色的戏份有多大，但他的角色将与Snoop Dogg的角色俄耳甫斯有交集，后者是一个试图在日本出人头地的走私者。

paragraphs.en: Stranger Than Heaven releases on January 15th, 2027 for PC, PS5 and Xbox Series X|S.
paragraphs.cn: 《Stranger Than Heaven》将于2027年1月15日登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S平台。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上找到他@Cade_Onder。
